description_long: This advertising board features a vibrant, colorful printed poster with a surreal, collage-like design. The main visual element is a person lying on a patterned surface, surrounded by various animal prints and abstract backgrounds. Bold white text at the top reads 'Good Time Guaranteed,' while the lower section says 'Feeling Blue?' and provides a phone number. The board is supported by a freestanding black metal frame with four legs and a slight backward tilt for stability. The back of the board is solid black, with no visible content or illumination features. The overall construction appears lightweight and portable, suitable for temporary outdoor or sidewalk placement.
description: A freestanding advertising board with a vivid, surreal printed poster and bold text, supported by a black metal frame.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thin profile of the board and the angled support legs.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the colorful advertisement with text and graphics, fully visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the slimness and structural supports of the frame.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the solid black back panel and the supporting frame structure.
attribute_frame_design: thin black metal frame with straight edges and four supporting legs
attribute_advertisement_content: static printed poster with surreal graphics, bold text, and a phone number
